user.title: Dreame Scheduler
user.description: Choose the Dreame vacuum to schedule. You can add the integration again for a second robot.

error.prefix_mismatch: That vacuum's entities couldn't be found (it may have been renamed). The scheduler needs the vacuum, its sensors and room selects to share one name. Rename it back, or re-add it, then try again.

abort.already_configured: This vacuum already has a scheduler.

general.title: General
general.description: When cleaning is allowed to run, guards before starting, the weekly whole-house catch-up, and quiet mode.

data.window_overrun: Finish the current room if the window closes mid-clean
data.guard_water: Skip if water tanks need attention
data.return_on_arrival: Return to dock if someone comes home
data.resume_when_away: Resume remaining rooms once everyone leaves again
data.catchup_enabled: Guarantee whole house once a week
data.stale_nudge_enabled: Nudge me to clean while home if overdue
data.stale_after_days: Nudge after this many days without a clean

presence.title: Presence & notifications
presence.description: Who counts as 'home', and where alerts go.

data.require_away: Only clean when no one is home
data.away_grace_min: Wait this long after everyone leaves
data.notify_stuck: Notify if the robot gets stuck

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.description: Pick a room to set its schedule.

room_edit.title: Room: {room}
room_edit.description: Schedule and per-room settings. Leave mode/suction blank to use the defaults.

data.enabled: Include this room in the schedule

abort.no_rooms: No rooms found yet. Let the vacuum finish a full map first, then try again.
